chapter_title.ar: باب صَلَاةِ فَاطِمَةَ ( عليها السلام ) وَ غَيْرِهَا مِنْ صَلَاةِ التَّرْغِيبِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 92 – Salāt of Syeda Fatima<sup>asws</sup>, and others from the Salāt of exhortation

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/448)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/448)
text: مَنْ صَلَّى الْمَغْرِبَ وَ بَعْدَهَا أَرْبَعَ رَكَعَاتٍ وَ لَمْ يَتَكَلَّمْ حَتَّى يُصَلِّيَ عَشْرَ رَكَعَاتٍ يَقْرَأُ فِي كُلِّ رَكْعَةٍ بِالْحَمْدِ وَ قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ كَانَتْ عِدْلَ عَشْرِ رِقَابٍ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from one of our companions,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan Al-Rezaasws having said: ‘The one who prays the Maghrib Salāt, and four Rak’at after it, and does not speak until he has prayed ten Rak’at, reciting in each Rak’at with Al-Hamd (Chapter 1), and [112:1] Say He Allah is One (Chapter 112), it would equate to (freeing) ten necks (slaves)’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from certain individuals of our people who have said the following: “Abu al-Hassan al-Rida, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If one after performing Maghrib (Salah (prayer) soon after sunset), the four Rak‘at and before speaking to anyone performs ten Rak‘at Salah (prayer), recites al-Fatihah and Chapter 112 of the Holy Quran it is equal in reward to setting free of ten slaves.”
